summary: FINAL PRE-DEPLOY BETA VERIFICATION SWEEP (Feb 18, 2026). Backend: 169/169 PASS (regression_shield 123 + test_beta_waitlist 38 + test_beta_tester_seeder 8). New auth-flow tests 7/7 PASS (3 beta tester logins, demo login, signup, beta-waitlist submit, wrong-password guard). Beta tester seeder log line confirmed in /var/log/supervisor/backend_error.log: 'beta tester seeder: created=0 healed=0 untouched=3 total=3' — all 3 accounts auto-provisioned and idempotent. Frontend live-URL verification: /login → demo-login → /dashboard ✓; all 9 AAA games render with CasinoTableEnhancer aaa-enhancer + ChipStakeSelector + mobile-sticky CTA (Craps, Yahtzee, SicBo, ThreeCardPoker, CaribbeanStud, Hazard, BigSixWheel, PaiGow, CasinoWar). Craps full interactivity verified — chip-25 click selects stake, ROLL CTA fires, [data-testid='craps-result'] renders. Admin: /vibe-vault-admin login with founder password + 2FA 000000 → redirects to /vibe-vault-admin/dashboard, then /vibe-vault-admin/beta-waitlist renders all 5 widgets (TOTAL/WAITLISTED/INVITED/REDEEMED stat cards, Invite→Redeem Conversion bar, Top Interests + Top Referrals panels, Ambassador Leaderboard, Founder Pulse Weekly Digest). beta-admin-dashboard + beta-admin-bulk-invite-btn testids both present. /beta-tester public page submits and renders share/leaderboard state. NO DEPLOYMENT BLOCKERS FOUND.
action_items: [NON-BLOCKING — SPEC vs CODE drift, NOT a bug] Review request listed expected testids that do NOT match actual implementation. The actual testids are: (a) /three-card-poker → 'tcp-aaa-enhancer' (not 'three-card-poker-aaa-enhancer'), (b) /caribbean-stud → 'cs-aaa-enhancer' (not 'caribbean-stud-aaa-enhancer'), (c) generic shells → '<slug>-page-aaa-enhancer' + '<slug>-page-stake-chip-25' (e.g. 'hazard-page-aaa-enhancer', not 'hazard-aaa-enhancer'). All testids ARE present and rendering — only the naming convention in the test spec was off. No code change needed unless the founder wants the testid scheme normalized.

[NON-BLOCKING — URL drift] Big Six route is /big-six-wheel (not /big-six). The page renders perfectly at /big-six-wheel. If the founder wants a /big-six alias, add a <Route path='/big-six' element={<Navigate to='/big-six-wheel' replace />} /> in gamesRoutes.tsx.
[CARRYOVER from feb17] /european-roulette uses _GenericCasinoGame so BallSpin only fires on AAA practice / vibes-wheel routes. Source wiring is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Beta tester seeder is idempotent and fires on every backend boot — confirmed via log + via 3-account login test. Healed=3 then untouched=3 across consecutive boots = correct idempotent behavior.

ChipStakeSelector renders 5 chip values ($5/$10/$25/$50/$100) with classic casino colors and gold ring on the selected one — confirmed visually on /craps screenshot (chip-25 click triggers visible stake selection + ROLL CTA on desktop + sticky bottom CTA on mobile).

Admin login flow uses 2-step (password → 2FA) and persists session via localStorage; redirect to /vibe-vault-admin/dashboard is clean. Beta Waitlist Control Tower renders all 5 widgets with live counts (1 signup, 1 waitlisted from the regression test fixture).
Auto-seeder pattern is the correct way to guarantee beta tester access on every redeploy — survives Atlas migration as long as MONGO_URL is set.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all critical flows green (demo login, 3 beta tester logins via API, 9 AAA games render + interact, admin 2FA flow, beta-tester public submit). Two non-blocking spec drifts noted in action_items.

test_credentials: Verified live: betatester{1,2,3}@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! all return HTTP 200 with valid token + profile_completed=true. Admin GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! + 2FA 000000 verified via UI flow. Demo login via [data-testid='login-demo-btn'] auto-provisions guest.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_wl_<hex>@example.com beta-waitlist row + 1 TEST_signup_<hex>@example.com user via test API calls — both prefixed for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deploy GREEN. To re-run: `cd /app/backend && PYTHONPATH=/app/backend pytest tests/regression_shield.py tests/test_beta_waitlist.py tests/test_beta_tester_seeder.py tests/test_iter_feb18_2026_beta_redeploy_final.py -q` (note: PYTHONPATH=/app/backend is REQUIRED for regression_shield.py to import server module). Beta tester seeder log lives in /var/log/supervisor/backend_error.log — grep 'beta tester seeder'. AAA testid naming convention is gameId-derived (Craps='craps', Yahtzee='yahtzee', SicBo='sicbo', TCP='tcp', CaribbeanStud='cs', generic shells='<slug>-page'). Actual route for Big Six is /big-six-wheel.
rca of the issue: No deployment blockers. Two cosmetic spec drifts (testid naming + /big-six URL) — code is correct, spec doc is stale. Founder can deploy.
